CgFA.n:
A0 A1 

This is a very basic opening, considered to be somewhat weak. It provides O with one immediate preemptive, but X can easily block.

EgEAAAQ.n:
A0 B0

A somewhat weak opening, building a closed two, allowing X to build pre-emp by an open three (x A1 A4, x A1 B2 or x A2 B4) or a triangle (x A2 A3 or x A1 A2).
